title: تنقيط جميع الحروف
instruction_en: Write the letter ... (each page names one letter)
notes: Sampled pages 1-7, 15, 29 (9 of 29). Cover page p1 = 'حروفي' (My Letters), prepared by الأستاذة ماجدة العشري. Pages 2-29 = one Arabic letter per page in standard alphabetical order (28 letters, ا..ي). Each page layout: title 'أكتب حرف X' (Write the letter X) top-right, a top model row showing the solid letter 4x, then 5 rows x 4 cells of dotted/guided isolated letterforms to trace. Confirmed sequence anchors: p2=أ, p3=ب, p4=ت, p5=ث, p6=ج, p7=ح, p15=ص, p29=ي — consistent with full alphabet order. 'letters' array lists the canonical 28-letter alphabet (alif written as ا; cover/p2 model glyph shows hamza form أ). No example words/vocab — pure isolated-letter tracing. items[] holds only the sampled pages.
